title: MemoryRecord
description: A single memory record in the personal/household/site memory store.

user_id.description: Owner of this memory record. For HOUSEHOLD_SHARED, this is the user who created it.

scope.description: Memory scope — determines who can read/write this record

content.description: Human-readable content of the memory record

structured_data.description: Optional structured representation of the content

tags.description: User-defined or system-assigned tags for retrieval

embedding.description: Vector embedding for semantic search (generated locally; not stored in JSON representation)

expires_at.description: When this record expires; null for indefinite records

trigger_at.description: For REMINDER type: when to surface this reminder

triggered.description: For REMINDER type: whether it has been surfaced
